channel.title: Arne's website
channel.description: A virtual proof that name is awesome!

item.title: W37 update, progress, forward...
item.description: This week I’ve almost completed filling the portfolio page with various projects that I’ve worked on. I must admit, this this process of structuring and organizing was quite enjoyable in the beginning, but as time passed, I started to mistakes. This became quite exhausting, that after filling out the final...

item.title: Bienvenue, Welcome, Wilkommen, Tere tulemast!
item.description: On this website, I am going to organize and collect all the projects I have worked on, associated also with my travels, stories from life in Estonia, Germany and France. I will build this website over the time and hopefully keep it fresh!
